items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The validation of the persona scenario 'Group size changes after booking' is blocked because prior steps indicate that exploratory validation was inconclusive due to LLM evaluation call failures. Specifically, multiple prior steps (uc-need-validate-1 to uc-need-validate-8) were blocked with similar issues, indicating a systemic problem with the evaluation process. Without a successful evaluation, the outcome of the scenario cannot be determined.
